name: lockedin-vscode-tracker
description: Sends your active coding time to LockedIn's /api/track endpoint.

lockedin.endpoint.description: URL of your LockedIn /api/track endpoint. The local desktop app runs on port 3000 and stays in the tray, so this tracks whenever the app is running.

lockedin.idleSeconds.description: Stop counting after this many seconds with no edits/keystrokes.

lockedin.flushSeconds.description: How often to send accumulated active time.
